name: Snow Battel Arena
description: Snowball Battle Arena 3D is an action-packed first-person shooter set in a frozen battlefield. Armed with unlimited snowballs, players must survive wave after wave of hostile snowmen that grow stronger over time. Use quick movement, jumping, and dash abilities to stay alive while defending yourself in a beautifully animated winter arena. How many waves can you survive?
instructions: Keyboard amp Mouse Controls W A S D ndash Move Mouse ndash Aim Left Click ndash Throw Snowball Space ndash Jump E ndash Dash ESC ndash Pause Game
